title: helichrysum cephaloideum
intro: Helichrysum cephaloideum, also known as Goldrush or False Gold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum cephaloideum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as essential oil, capsules, and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
